products.name: Donald Trump Stencil
products.shortDesc: Halftone spray-paint stencil. Two sizes, card stock or plastic.
products.description:
Halftone dot stencil of Donald Trump — perfect for street art, spray paint projects, or bold statement pieces.

Cut from heavy card stock or durable plastic for clean lines and multiple uses. Comes with instructions.

products.name: Art Print — 8×10"
products.shortDesc: Giclée-quality print on 100lb matte paper. Ships rolled in a tube.
products.description:
High-quality giclée print on heavyweight 100lb matte paper. Rich, vibrant colours that last.

Ships carefully rolled in a protective tube. Arrives ready to frame — just add a standard 8×10" frame from any shop.

products.name: Original — "Title Here"

products.description:
One-of-a-kind original piece. Spray paint on stretched canvas, 24×36". Signed and dated on the back.

Update this description with details about the actual piece — the inspiration, the process, when it was made.

products.name: Sticker — Single
products.description:
Die-cut vinyl sticker. Waterproof, UV-resistant, and built to last outdoors.

Approximately 3" on the longest side.

products.name: Sticker Pack — 5 Stickers
products.shortDesc: Five die-cut vinyl stickers. Mix of designs.
products.description:
Five die-cut vinyl stickers — a mix of our best designs. Waterproof, UV-resistant, and built to last outdoors.

Great for gifting or stocking up.

products.name: Sticker Pack — 10 Stickers
products.shortDesc: Ten die-cut vinyl stickers. Best value for collectors.
products.description:
Ten die-cut vinyl stickers — the full collection. Waterproof, UV-resistant, built to last.

Best value for collectors and crews.

products.name: Spray Paint — Matte Black
products.shortDesc: Low-pressure cap for fine detail work. Fast-drying.
products.description:
Low-pressure cap for fine detail work. Fast-drying formula with minimal bleed — perfect for stencilling.

Matte finish. 400ml can.

products.name: Spray Paint — Matte White
products.shortDesc: High-coverage white. Great on dark surfaces.
products.description:
High-coverage white. Great on dark surfaces and for layering. Fast-drying, minimal drip.

Matte finish. 400ml can.

products.name: Spray Paint — Signal Red
products.shortDesc: Vibrant, bold red. Fast-drying, minimal drip.
products.description:
Vibrant signal red. Bold and fast-drying with minimal drip.

Matte finish. 400ml can.

products.name: Spray Paint — 3 Can Bundle
products.shortDesc: Black, White and Red. Everything you need to get started.
products.description:
Black, White and Signal Red — everything you need to get started with stencil work.

Three 400ml cans, low-pressure caps, fast-drying formula.
